title: Starting SIP at 25 vs 35: How a 10-year delay can shrink your retirement corpus by nearly ₹25 lakh
summary: Delaying a SIP by 10 years can significantly reduce retirement corpus due to the loss of compounding. A ₹1,000 monthly SIP started at 25 years of age grows to an estimated ₹37.97 lakh by age 60, compared with ₹13.27 lakh if started at 35 years, assuming a 10% annual return.

title: First time borrowers to lead the next wave of credit growth in India
summary: The next wave of credit growth is likely to emerge from segments that have historically been underserved, overlooked, or difficult to evaluate through conventional methods. Today, only about 17.8% of new loans are disbursed to first-time borrowers.&nbsp;

title: 10-5-3 rule of investing: Why it helps investors build realistic wealth expectations
summary: Smart investing starts with realistic expectations. The 10-5-3 rule helps beginners understand investment returns, compare asset classes, manage risk, and build long-term wealth through disciplined financial planning instead of chasing unrealistic market gains.

title: Fuel inflation isn't just about petrol. It changes your entire financial plan
summary: Fuel price shocks ripple through transport, food and household budgets. Here's what history teaches—and the practical financial strategies families can adopt to stay ahead of inflation.

title: SWP taxation explained: Why every withdrawal from a mutual fund can have a different tax liability
summary: For tax purposes, each SWP payout is considered a partial redemption of mutual fund units. This means every withdrawal comprises two components: the return of the original investment (principal) and capital gains. Tax is levied only on the capital gains component of each withdrawal.

title: mAadhaar app retires: Will your Aadhaar data be deleted? Key features of new app
summary: The new Aadhaar app replaces mAadhaar with safer digital verification, face authentication and QR features. Existing mAadhaar data remains available during the transition, allowing users to switch smoothly without losing important Aadhaar records.

title: AI upskilling: Is an expensive certification a smart capital investment or an expensive reaction to career anxiety?
summary: Experts point out that course certificates alone don't count for much. Market premiums and career advancement go to those who can translate coursework into functional workplace optimization.

title: Why your financial goals must change when your net worth does
summary: As wealth grows, financial planning shifts from chasing returns to matching capital with purpose. A three-bucket framework can help families protect lifestyle, preserve flexibility and build a lasting legacy.

title: Life certificate scam alert: 5 tips to protect pensioners from fake bank links and cyber fraud

title: Trader gets ₹21 lakh tax demand over demonetisation cash, wins at ITAT
